clinicBanner.title: Book a Free 3D Teeth Scan and Orthodontist Consult in a Clove Dental Clinic near you.

whyWhistle.title: Custom-made & invisible
whyWhistle.description: Tailored for your teeth and smile with a clear, discreet appearance.

whyWhistle.title: Predictable results
whyWhistle.description: Advanced 3D modeling and AI-technology for precise planning and predictable results.

whyWhistle.title: Partnership with Clove Dental
whyWhistle.description: Led by highly experienced Orthodontists of Clove Dental and Whistle that have corrected over 2 lakh smiles.

whyWhistle.title: Unlimited Aligners*
whyWhistle.description: Unlimited aligners and doctor consults at no extra cost.

dreamSmiles.headline: Dream smiles achieved secretly
dreamSmiles.description1: Experience the superior quality of our Whistle Aligners crafted with 3-layer PU material. With 450+ clinics nationwide, enjoy comfortable treatment by expert orthodontists at House of Clove.
dreamSmiles.description2: The pricing is different for every case. Cases with higher complexity requiring more aligners and additional time and effort from our dentists.

product.name: Whistle Aligners
features: Offer valid for a limited time

whistleDifference.title: Next-Gen
whistleDifference.description: Crafted with top-notch 3D printing, laser tech, and Zendura FLX material.

whistleDifference.title: Hassle-Free
whistleDifference.description: Predictable, comfortable & lifestyle-friendly for an easy smile transformation.

whistleDifference.title: Transparent Pricing
whistleDifference.description: Everything's included – from scans to aligners, doctor consults, and retainers – no hidden costs.
